typography.instructions: UPGRADE TEXT VISIBILITY: Replace text-zinc-500/text-zinc-400 with text-zinc-300/text-zinc-400 for better APCA contrast. Use text-white for primary values and headings. Small texts should not fall below text-zinc-400.

cards.hover: hover:border-zinc-600 hover:bg-zinc-800/40 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300 ease-out hover:-translate-y-0.5
cards.instructions: Transform static cards into interactive surfaces. Add hover lift (-translate-y-0.5), active scale-down (scale-[0.98]), and border brightness increase to give tactile feedback. Clickable cards must show obvious interaction states.

stat_cards.base: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-lg p-5 flex flex-col relative overflow-hidden group transition-all duration-300 ease-out
stat_cards.value_text: text-3xl font-bold text-white font-mono group-hover:text-blue-400 transition-colors
stat_cards.instructions: Increase contrast of labels from zinc-400 to zinc-300. Add subtle primary color bleed on hover for values. Add click animation (scale down) to make stats feel tactile.

navigation.sidebar: w-64 h-screen bg-zinc-950 border-r border-zinc-800 flex flex-col z-40
navigation.link_base: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-zinc-400 hover:text-zinc-100 hover:bg-white/5 transition-all duration-200 rounded-md mx-2
navigation.instructions: Make the sidebar feel snappy. Links should have a subtle background shift (bg-white/5) and text should brighten significantly. The active link gets a clear visual indicator without overwhelming.

data_tables.header: text-left text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-zinc-300 px-4 py-3 border-b border-zinc-800
data_tables.row: hover:bg-zinc-800/50 transition-colors duration-150 cursor-default border-b border-zinc-800
data_tables.instructions: Data tables need high legibility. Upgrade header text to zinc-300. Upgrade cell text to zinc-200. Ensure clear hover state on rows to help the eye track data horizontally.

motion_and_interactions.philosophy: Frictionless and Tactile. Every interactive element must react to hover and click.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Use Framer Motion to wrap page content in a subtle fade and slight slide up (initial={opacity:0, y:10}, animate={opacity:1, y:0}, transition={duration: 0.3, ease: 'easeOut'}).
motion_and_interactions.scrolling: Implement smooth scrolling to make navigation feel modern and fluid. Use standard CSS `scroll-behavior: smooth` on html/body element.
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: All buttons and clickable cards MUST scale down slightly on click (active:scale-[0.98]) to simulate a physical button press.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 for body text and 3:1 for large text. The shift from zinc-500 to zinc-400/300 resolves the washed-out text issue.
accessibility.focus_states: All focusable elements (links, inputs, buttons, clickable cards) MUST have a focus ring: focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-zinc-950.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must include 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='sidebar-nav-link').

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. You are working with a React app using JS/JSX, DO NOT use TS/TSX.

2. Edit `/app/frontend/src/index.css` to update base text colors and component classes (`.dashboard-card`, `.sidebar-link`, `.stat-card`, etc.) to match the new high-visibility and interactive classes specified in this JSON. Specifically, update `.stat-label` text to `text-zinc-300`, and `.sidebar-link` text to `text-zinc-300`.
3. Overhaul `.dashboard-card` and `.stat-card` to include `hover:-translate-y-0.5 active:scale-[0.98] transition-all duration-300 cursor-pointer`.
4. Search and replace instances of `text-zinc-500` and `text-zinc-400` in JSX files with `text-zinc-400` and `text-zinc-300` respectively.
5. Install `framer-motion` using yarn and wrap the main page layouts or routes in an `<AnimatePresence>` / `<motion.div>` setup for a smooth fade-in page transition.
6. Add `scroll-behavior: smooth` to the `:root` or `html` block in CSS.
7. Add `data-testid` attributes to all links, buttons, and cards.
